events.label: reasoning
events.text: We need produce JSON answer. Need parse scenario. Field service, conductor selection & sizing, observed undersized for load + length (voltage drop), work in progress. Need decide pass/fail/needs_more_info. Since non-compliant and potentially dangerous? Undersized conductor for load and length causes overheating, voltage drop, fire risk. Decision must be fail if dangerous or non-compliant. It is non-compliant. Risk high maybe critical? Let's assess. Undersized for load violates ampacity NEC 310.16; voltage drop may be recommended but not necessarily code violation unless excessive? NEC has fine print note 210.19(A)(1) info note recommending 3%/5% voltage drop, not enforceable. But undersized for load is code violation. In operating asset, could overheat. Risk high. Work stage in-progress. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Percent complete maybe 60? Value maybe computed voltage drop? Not asked numeric reading. Could leave 0 or compute? The schema says use value for numeric reading or computed quantity when task asks for one. Not asked. But maybe include computed? We don't have load/length. So 0. Sound_source etc default empty? Schema expects string for sound_source, numbers. Use empty string and 0. Order empty list. Workable empty list. Findings: conductor undersized for load and length, voltage drop excessive, ampacity insufficient. Actions: de-energize circuit, calculate load and voltage drop, select conductor per NEC 310.16 and voltage drop requirements, replace conductors, verify terminations and protection. Rationale. References: NEC 310.16, NEC 110.3(B), NEC 210.19(A)(1) FPN. Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

    "Conductors are undersized for the connected load, violating ampacity requirements",
    "Excessive voltage drop due to conductor length and undersizing",
    "Potential overheating and fire hazard from overloaded conductors"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "De-energize the circuit before replacing conductors",
    "Calculate actual load current and total circuit length",
    "Select replacement conductors sized per NEC Table 310.16 ampacity and acceptable voltage drop",
    "Verify overcurrent protection and termination ratings match new conductor size",
    "Replace undersized conductors and retest under load"
  ],
  "rationale": "Undersized conductors for load and length create both a code violation (insufficient ampacity per NEC 310.16) and an operating hazard from overheating and excessive voltage drop, so the installation cannot be accepted as-is.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 310",
    "NEC Table 310.16",
    "NEC 110.3(B)",
    "NEC 210.19(A)(1) Informational Note"
  ]
